string 2:
The sewers are up ahead. They're usually blocked off because
they're dangerous.

The Digimon here are different from the city's residents.
Many of them are violent and tend to attack strangers.

I'd only hold you back if I came along. Can I trust you to
take care of this?
You can trust us.{next}
There's nothing ADAMAS can't do.{next}
...I'd be lying if I said I wasn't nervous.{next}
Great! I'm counting on you, then.
Oh, I'm sure you'll be fine!
...Probably.
But be careful! I'll look for Minerva in the meantime.
If I have any luck in my search, I'll bring Minnie to you guys right away!

What a strange quest you've taken on... But if you get to
reunite with Minervamon, it isn't such a bad trade.

Asking Minervamon how to get back is likely the most
efficient option. I have plenty of other questions, too.

If it leads to getting more information, it will hardly be 
a waste of time. Still, be careful, Agent {player}.
So these are the sewers of a Digimon town, huh?

Coronamon and the others should be up ahead somewhere. I'm
worried we'll get caught trespassing, but... should we go?

Oh, my. Look who we have here. We do seem to meet at some 
strange places, don't we?

This is the In-Between, a dimension that exists between 
worlds.

You must've gotten lost while coming and going between the
two worlds as well.

But the only way out is the way you came in. You can't get to
the other world from here, I'm afraid.

You could at least prepare for the destiny you're about to
face, though, while you're here.
Uhhh... ugh-uhhh...
What happened here?{next}
With this agent on the scene, don't you worry about a thing.{next}
Uh-oh...{next}
Wh-Wh-Who're you?! N-No, never mind that now!
T-T-T... T-T-T-Titans!
There are Titans here!
Big Bro protected me from 'em, and then...
...the two of them ran up ahead chasing after the Titans!
Titans?

If I remember correctly... Minervamon called that big Digimon in
Shinjuku a "Titan," too...

Big Bro told me to run on home, but I'm goin', too! I'll
show ya the way!
Please! Help my Big Bro!
Damn you, Titans!
Y-You leave those kids alone!
I-Inori! No! What are you doing?!

But look at them... They're obviously bullying kids weaker 
than them!
More prey for us, eh? Thanks for showin' up to be hunted!
...I won't let you lay a finger on Inori!
Huh? Who do ya think you are, runt?!
This is ADAMAS. Identify yourselves.{next}
You'll need to identify yourselves first. Are you Titans?{next}
Don't pick on the weak.{next}
That's not somethin' you need to know...
...because you'll all soon be dead!
Eek!
You heard Inori! We won't let you run wild here!

Th-That goes for me, too! I'll finish you all without
breaking a sweat!
And I-I'm not scared at all, okay?! Let's gooooo!

So ya know who we are, eh? All the more reason we ain't 
lettin' ya leave here alive!
I got no time to be listenin' to any lectures outta you!
Hold it right there!

Looks like you thugs have done a number on that little brother
of mine right there.

He may be a little bratty so-and-so... But he's MY little bratty so-and-so.
And I wouldn't trade him for anything.
So, sorry in advance, but I don't see myself holding back here.
...Prepare yourselves!
Guaaagh!
Now, let's clean up this mess!
You! It's Minervamon!
Perfect. Now we can take out the lot of ya at once!

I'll never be able to protect Inori if I let something like
this beat me!
Aegiomon...!

That night, under that starry sky... you said "always,"
right? That you'd always be by my side...?

That's why... I swore in my heart then that I wouldn't let
myself get down in the dumps again!

I'll get stronger! So I can protect you, Inori—right here,
by your side!
Such power! Could he really be from that egg after all...?!
Man, look at him go...! Well, I-I can fight too, you know!
What good am I if I can't even take on these goons!
There!
Did you see me? Did you see what I can do? Hahaha!
Unbelievable...

How many times have I told you NOT to go down into the
underground?!
I'm sorry...
And that goes for you two, as well!
You shut up! You can't tell us what to do!
Absolutely hopeless...
I'm just glad you're safe. All of you.
I haven't exactly processed everything yet...

But we've got a serious problem if the Titans have
infiltrated Central Town.
We've got to report this to Merukimon. You coming, egg thief?
Who's Merukimon?{next}
Tell us more about the Titans.
I assure you that I'm not an egg thief.

This town's leader, and a dependable one at that. We should
go report in to him.

They're our enemies. A real pain in the behind, I gotta say.
I'll tell you more when I've got the time.
What can I say? It just rolls off the tongue so easily.
Merukimon's base is near the square. Let's go!

Titans, huh...? It seems Digimon are infighting among their
own kind.

The Shinjuku Inferno we experienced was apparently also 
caused by a fight between Digimon.
Would it be wrong to assume there's some sort of connection...?

We may be getting closer to the truth. I'd like you to find
out as much as you can over in that world.
